glosses.ja: バイク; オートバイ

sentences.target: Ich fahre heute mit dem Motorrad zur Arbeit.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfaːʁə ˈhɔʏtə mɪt deːm ˈmoːtoːʁaːt tsuːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/

translations.de: Ich fahre heute mit dem Motorrad zur Arbeit.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfaːʁə ˈhɔʏtə mɪt deːm ˈmoːtoːʁaːt tsuːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪ̯t/
translations.en: I’m riding the motorcycle to work today.
translations.es: Hoy voy al trabajo en moto.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je vais au travail à moto.
translations.it: Oggi vado al lavoro in moto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天骑摩托车去上班。
translations.ru: Сегодня я еду на работу на мотоцикле.
translations.pt: Hoje vou para o trabalho de moto.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi đi làm bằng xe máy.
translations.ar: اليوم سأذهب إلى العمل بالدراجة النارية.
translations.nl: Vandaag ga ik met de motor naar mijn werk.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я їду на роботу на мотоциклі.
translations.hi: आज मैं मोटरसाइकिल से दफ्तर जा रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Dziś jadę do pracy na motocyklu.
translations.el: Σήμερα πάω στη δουλειά με τη μηχανή.
translations.nb: I dag kjører jeg motorsykkel til jobb.
translations.id: Hari ini saya naik motor ke kantor.
translations.sv: Idag kör jag motorcykel till jobbet.
translations.ro: Astăzi merg la serviciu cu motocicleta.
translations.cs: Dnes jedu do práce na motorce.
translations.da: I dag tager jeg motorcyklen på arbejde.
translations.ja: 今日はバイクで仕事に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular; predicates the action.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the event.
Preposition governing dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative phrase.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; determiner for 'Motorrad'.
Common noun, neuter; object of 'mit' (dative), indicating the means of transport.
Preposition (contracted form of 'zu der') governing dative; marks destination/goal.
Common noun, feminine; complement of 'zur' in dative, indicates destination.

sentences.target: Mein Motorrad springt heute nicht an.

translations.de: Mein Motorrad springt heute nicht an.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, ma moto ne démarre pas.
translations.it: Oggi la mia moto non parte.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我的摩托车打不着火。
translations.yue: 我今日部電單車撻唔著。
translations.vi: Hôm nay xe máy của tôi không nổ máy.
translations.hi: आज मेरी मोटरसाइकिल स्टार्ट नहीं हो रही है.
translations.el: Σήμερα η μηχανή μου δεν παίρνει μπροστά.
translations.nb: I dag starter ikke motorsykkelen min.
translations.id: Hari ini motor saya tidak mau menyala.
translations.da: I dag starter min motorcykel ikke.
translations.ja: 今日はバイクのエンジンがかかりません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with 'Motorrad' (nominative singular neuter).
Common noun, neuter; subject of the clause (nominative singular).
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; part of the separable verb 'anspringen' (engine starting).
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the event.
Negation particle; negates the verbal predicate.
Separable verbal particle belonging to 'anspringen'; placed at clause-final position.

sentences.target: Die Nachbarn waschen ihr Motorrad im Hof.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈnaχbaʁn ˈvaʃən iːɐ̯ ˈmoːtoːʁaːt ɪm hoːf/

translations.de: Die Nachbarn waschen ihr Motorrad im Hof.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈnaχbaʁn ˈvaʃən iːɐ̯ ˈmoːtoːʁaːt ɪm hoːf/
translations.en: The neighbors are washing their motorcycle in the courtyard.
translations.es: Los vecinos están lavando su moto en el patio.
translations.fr: Les voisins lavent leur moto dans la cour.
translations.it: I vicini stanno lavando la loro moto nel cortile.
translations.zh-Hans: 邻居们在院子里洗他们的摩托车。
translations.yue: 鄰居喺天井度洗緊佢哋嘅電單車。
translations.ru: Соседи моют свой мотоцикл во дворе.
translations.pt: Os vizinhos estão lavando a moto deles no pátio.
translations.he: השכנים שוטפים את האופנוע שלהם בחצר.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm đang rửa chiếc xe máy của họ ở sân.
translations.ar: الجيران يغسلون دراجتهم النارية في الفناء.
translations.nl: De buren wassen hun motor op de binnenplaats.
translations.uk: Сусіди миють свій мотоцикл у дворі.
translations.hu: A szomszédok az udvaron mossák a motorjukat.
translations.hi: पड़ोसी आँगन में अपनी मोटरसाइकिल धो रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Sąsiedzi myją swój motocykl na podwórku.
translations.el: Οι γείτονες πλένουν τη μηχανή τους στην αυλή.
translations.nb: Naboene vasker motorsykkelen sin i bakgården.
translations.id: Para tetangga sedang mencuci motor mereka di halaman.
translations.sv: Grannarna tvättar sin motorcykel på gården.
translations.ro: Vecinii își spală motocicleta în curte.
translations.cs: Sousedé si na dvoře myjí motorku.
translations.da: Naboerne vasker deres motorcykel i gården.
translations.ja: 近所の人たちが中庭でバイクを洗っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner for the subject 'Nachbarn'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Die Nachbarn'.
Possessive determiner; modifies 'Motorrad' (accusative singular neuter).
Common noun, neuter; direct object of 'waschen' (accusative).
Preposition (contracted form of 'in dem') governing dative; marks location.
Common noun, masculine; object of 'im' in dative; location of the action.

sentences.target: Morgen leihe ich mir ein Motorrad.

translations.de: Morgen leihe ich mir ein Motorrad.
translations.es: Mañana voy a tomar prestada una moto.
translations.it: Domani prendo in prestito una moto.
translations.pt: Amanhã vou pegar uma moto emprestada.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi mượn một chiếc xe máy.
translations.hi: कल मैं एक मोटरसाइकिल उधार लूँगा.
translations.nb: I morgen låner jeg en motorsykkel.
translations.da: I morgen låner jeg en motorcykel.
translations.ja: 明日バイクを借ります。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; sentence-initial time frame setting (V2 context).
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular; occupies the verb-second position.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject placed after the finite verb (V2 word order).
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/benefactive.
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner for 'Motorrad'.
Common noun, neuter; direct object of 'leihe' (accusative).
